title: Easy With Marinda – Margit Meyer-Rödenbeck

seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Margit Meyer-Rödenbeck - Marinda Kook

html:
My dear friend and partner Margit and I go a long way back. She's a dynamic woman with a passion for life. Unfortunately there isn't quite a passion for cooking. Whether it's because she's so busy, or because she just doesn't enjoy it. We'll let it slip on the show.

Like her, a lot of people are scared to cook oxtail. Oxtail is so easy – it just takes time! Now if you have a slow cooker, you just throw everything in and forget about it until you wake up the next day. You just need to know what to put in. So in this episode with Margit I show you what to put in. We served it with lovely roasted vegetables and polenta slices. Polenta is really just grand mieliepap, and I added a little something and showed her how to slice it with a piece of wire. She was impressed!
